# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.

If you discover a security issue in Starbender.Mazer, contact the maintainer
privately through GitHub so we can coordinate investigation and disclosure.

If GitHub private vulnerability reporting is enabled for this repository, please
use that mechanism.

When reporting an issue, include:

- A description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce the issue
- Affected versions or commit ranges, if known
- Any suggested mitigations or fixes

We will make a best effort to acknowledge receipt promptly and keep you informed
as the issue is investigated.
